calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:56 am and concluding at 10:02 am.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank is present represented by Adam Brumage, Esq.
Defendant Hugh G. Graham is not present.

MARIANA EXHEVERRIA-LICONA is sworn to testify on behalf of plaintiff and testifies.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, and against Defendant Hugh G. Graham, as follows:

1. Damages: $12,158.54

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $12,158.54

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2023 Set For Trial On Nov-06-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
